name: Melbourne (Victoria, Australia)
description: A navy-blue field charged with the stylised yellow 'M' logo of the City of Melbourne.
history: The City of Melbourne adopted its modern flag bearing the city's stylised 'M' logo. Melbourne is the capital of Victoria and was incorporated as a town in 1842, becoming a city in 1847.

features.role: stylised 'M' logo of the City of Melbourne
